mentions.note: CEO Dave Kiley executing well despite European pivot headwinds and fiber competition from local NY tech company. Buy and put away.
Data-center cooling play; Verdive preferred instead—Carrier 'doesn't have the horses' for complex HVAC infrastructure.
Short squeeze from extreme overshorting; rallied $100→$700 to $800 peak in <1 month, now crashed to $229. Longs who didn't take strength profits wiped out; example of parabolic danger.
Air conditioning and climate control; data centers burn real hot; big upside surprise suggests multiyear move beginning; also strong European numbers.
Two-speed: residential cyclical recovery as rates fall (lean inventory, 30% down YoY); commercial HVAC + data center up 400% orders Q4, double-digit growth baseline.
